threats.title: 26 FakeWallet Apps Found on Apple App Store Targeting Crypto Seed Phrases

threats.summary: Chinese-speaking individuals are the target of a new campaign that uses a trojanized version of SumatraPDF reader to deploy the AdaptixC2 Beacon post-exploitation agent and ultimately facilitate the abuse of Microsoft Visual Studio Code (VS Code) tunnels for remote access.
